text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: olivierd

Log:
  MFH: r430635

  - Add patch, which removes 'show_editor' property (available in Gtk+
    since 3.20) in GtkColorButton, otherwise Preferences dialog
    is empty
  - Bump PORTREVISION

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (junovitch@)
